channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Rookie QB card could be worth $50K if you pull it from new Topps set
item.description: Denver Broncos rookie quarterback Bo Nix impressed on the field, and now a Colorado sports card store is ready to pay $50,000 to keep a unique card featuring him close to home.
item.dc:creator: Spencer Kristensen, NewsNation

item.title: While Manfred frets, some opposing players cheer the big-spending push of the Los Angeles Dodgers
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz. (AP) — Baseball Commissioner Rob Manfred shared conflicting feelings about the big-spending Los Angeles Dodgers this week, praising the franchise's competitive spirit in one breath before worrying about the financial disparity they've created in the next.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sponsor invite Akie Iwai leads the LPGA Thailand golf tournament by 3 strokes after 10-under 62
item.description: PATTAYA, Thailand (AP) — Akie Iwai made the best of a sponsor's invite to shoot a 10-under 62 and lead by three strokes after the first round of the LPGA's Thailand tournament at Siam Country Club's Pattaya Old Course.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Padres fans unite to restore North Park mural defaced by Dodgers graffiti
item.description: North Park residents are rallying to restore a beloved San Diego Padres mural in the neighborhood after it was defaced last month with blue spray paint, suggestive of the rival Los Angeles Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Bears announce 10% average increase to 2025 season-ticket packages
item.description: CHICAGO — Bears season-ticket holders will see an average price increase of 10% for their 2025 ticket packages, team President and CEO Kevin Warren announced.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Former Ohio State player Ben Christman's cause of death revealed
item.description: The 21-year-old from Akron died on Feb. 11, one day before his 22nd birthday at an off-campus residence near the University of Nevada Las Vegas.
item.dc:creator: Orri Benatar, NewsNation

item.title: International rugby match set to return to Chicago
item.description: Chicago has been chosen as the host city for the international rugby match between the All Blacks of New Zealand and Ireland, set to take place at Soldier Field on November 1.
item.dc:creator: Christine Flores, WGN 9

item.title: Reports: Cubs sign veteran 3B Justin Turner
item.description: CHICAGO — The Cubs are signing veteran free agent third baseman Justin Turner, according to multiple reports. Patrick Mooney with The Athletic reports that the deal is for $6 million for one year.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: William Byron speaks to NewsNation after Daytona 500 win
item.description: Byron made sure to celebrate his victory, sleeping for an hour before returning to Daytona International Speedway on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: San Diego FC nabs first win in preseason match, debuts new jersey
item.description: San Diego FC took its first win in a preseason friendly match against the New York Red Bulls on Saturday, less than a day after the club unveiled its secondary "Community Kit" in the lead up to the team's highly-anticipated debut.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: College student Jaren Barajas beats Damian Lillard in 3-point shooting contest, wins $100K
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Jaren Barajas shoots on his backyard hoop maybe once a month these days. He's a busy 18-year-old college student now, so basketball has taken a backburner to academics.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: UCLA, South Carolina, Texas and Notre Dame are No. 1 seeded teams in first NCAA Tournament reveal
item.description: UCLA, South Carolina, Texas and Notre Dame would be the No. 1 seeds in the women's NCAA Tournament if it began now. The NCAA basketball selection committee on Sunday did its first reveal of the teams in line for the top 16 seeds.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: William Byron avoids late wrecks to win 2nd straight Daytona 500
item.description: Ninth in the No. 24 Chevrolet with one lap left, Byron was in the right place by racing near the outside wall in overtime to became the first back-to-back winner since Denny Hamlin in 2019-20.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Shaq's OGs win the 1st NBA All-Star mini-tournament, topping Chuck's Global Stars 41-25 in the final
item.description: An All-Star Game like none other — since it was three games, not one — still had plenty of flash and not a lot of fire. And in the end, Boston's Jayson Tatum had the dunk that decided a crown.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Liverpool continues Premier League title charge and Man United's season keeps getting worse
item.description: Liverpool continued its charge toward the Premier League title on Sunday with a 2-1 win against Wolverhampton. For Manchester United, it just keeps getting worse after a 1-0 loss at Tottenham.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: The new NBA All-Star format is here, and Sunday night will show whether it works
item.description: This will be an actual All-Star matchup. On one side, there's a team with 86 combined All-Star selections, $2.7 billion in on-court earnings and where every single player on the team is either an NBA champion, an Olympic gold medalist, or both.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: NASCAR driver Ryan Blaney previews Daytona 500
item.description: Ryan Blaney, 2023 NASCAR Cup Series champion, joined NewsNation to talk Sunday's Daytona 500, which marks the 67th running of the event.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Central girls & Grand Junction boys secure wins in rivalry showdown
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — In a thrilling matchup that went to overtime, the Central Warriors edged out Grand Junction 55-51, securing their sixth win of the season. Tied at 44 heading into the extra period, Bianca Berens opened with a mid-range jumper to give Central the lead.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: San Diego Padres release 2025 spring broadcast schedule
item.description: The San Diego Padres unveiled their 2025 spring broadcast schedule Thursday, stirring excitement for the approaching season.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Jazz fall to Clippers in final game before All-Star break
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Norman Powell scored a season-high 41 points and James Harden added 32 to lift the Los Angeles Clippers to a 120-116 overtime victory over the Utah Jazz on Thursday night. Harden also had 10 rebounds, seven assists and three steals.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
